reasoning_model_1: The model generates the text content accurately: '早上好呀！今天的天气真不错。关于我们上次讨论的课题，我有一些更深入的思考和见解。'. The speech is fluent with a standard broadcast-style delivery. reasoning_model_2: The model generates the text content accurately with excellent naturalness. Regarding the core requirement, the model executes the dynamic adjustment perfectly. model_comparison: Model 1 failed to implement the requested paralinguistic change. Model 2, on the other hand, demonstrated a distinct and impressive gradient in sound quality.
